translations.da: Vi kommer godt ud af det sammen.
translations.ja: 私たちは仲がいいです。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural, nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, present indicative (1pl) expressing possession.
Indefinite article, accusative singular neuter; determiner of 'Verhältnis'.
Attributive adjective, accusative singular neuter agreeing with 'Verhältnis'.
Common noun, accusative singular neuter; direct object of 'haben' (sense: personal relationship).

sentences.target: Das Verhältnis von Wasser zu Reis passt.
sentences.reading: /das fɛɐ̯ˈhɛltnɪs fɔn ˈvasɐ tsuː ʁaɪ̯s past/

translations.de: Das Verhältnis von Wasser zu Reis passt.
translations.ipa: /das fɛɐ̯ˈhɛltnɪs fɔn ˈvasɐ tsuː ʁaɪ̯s past/
translations.en: The ratio of water to rice is right.
translations.es: La proporción de agua y arroz es la adecuada.
translations.fr: La proportion d'eau et de riz est bonne.
translations.it: Il rapporto tra acqua e riso è giusto.
translations.pt: A proporção de água e arroz está certa.
translations.vi: Tỷ lệ nước với gạo là đúng.
translations.nl: De verhouding tussen water en rijst is goed.
translations.hu: A víz és a rizs aránya megfelelő.
translations.hi: पानी और चावल का अनुपात सही है.
translations.pl: Proporcja wody do ryżu jest właściwa.
translations.el: Η αναλογία νερού προς ρύζι είναι σωστή.
translations.nb: Forholdet mellom vann og ris er riktig.
translations.id: Perbandingan air dan beras sudah pas.
translations.sv: Förhållandet mellan vatten och ris är rätt.
translations.ro: Raportul dintre apă și orez este potrivit.
translations.cs: Poměr vody a rýže je správný.
translations.da: Forholdet mellem vand og ris er rigtigt.
translations.fi: Veden ja riisin suhde on sopiva.
translations.ja: 水と米の割合はちょうどいいです。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative singular neuter; determiner of subject 'Verhältnis'.
Common noun, nominative singular neuter; head of the subject NP (sense: proportion/ratio).
Preposition governing dative; introduces the first term of the ratio.
Common noun, dative singular (form identical to nominative); object of 'von'.
Preposition governing dative; introduces the second term of the ratio.
Common noun, dative singular (form identical to nominative); object of 'zu'.
Finite main verb, present indicative (3sg); predicate stating that the ratio is appropriate.

sentences.target: Im Verhältnis zu früher ist die Miete hoch.
sentences.reading: /ɪm fɛɐ̯ˈhɛltnɪs tsuː ˈfʁyːɐ̯ ɪst diː ˈmiːtə hoːx/

translations.de: Im Verhältnis zu früher ist die Miete hoch.
translations.ipa: /ɪm fɛɐ̯ˈhɛltnɪs tsuː ˈfʁyːɐ̯ ɪst diː ˈmiːtə hoːx/
translations.en: Compared to earlier, the rent is high.
translations.es: El alquiler ahora es alto en comparación con antes.
translations.fr: Par rapport à avant, le loyer est élevé.
translations.it: Rispetto a prima, l'affitto è alto.
translations.yue: 同以前比，租金而家好貴。
translations.ru: По сравнению с тем, что было раньше, аренда высокая.
translations.pt: Em comparação com antes, o aluguel está alto.
translations.vi: So với trước đây, tiền thuê nhà cao.
translations.ar: مقارنةً بما كان عليه سابقًا، الإيجار مرتفع.
translations.nl: Vergeleken met vroeger is de huur hoog.
translations.uk: Порівняно з тим, що було раніше, оренда висока.
translations.hu: A korábbiakhoz képest magas a lakbér.
translations.hi: पहले की तुलना में किराया ज्यादा है.
translations.pl: W porównaniu z tym, co było wcześniej, czynsz jest wysoki.
translations.el: Σε σχέση με πριν, το ενοίκιο είναι υψηλό.
translations.nb: Sammenlignet med før er husleien høy.
translations.id: Dibandingkan dengan dulu, sewa sekarang mahal.
translations.sv: Jämfört med förr är hyran hög.
translations.ro: În comparație cu înainte, chiria este mare.
translations.cs: Ve srovnání s dřívějškem je nájem vysoký.
translations.da: Sammenlignet med før er huslejen høj.
translations.ja: 以前と比べると、家賃は高いです。

tokens.explanation: Contraction of 'in' + 'dem'; preposition heading a PP establishing a comparison frame ('in relation').
Common noun, dative singular governed by 'im'; head of PP in the fixed expression 'im Verhältnis zu' ('in relation to').
Preposition introducing the comparison target in the expression 'im Verhältnis zu'.
Temporal adverb ('earlier/in the past'); complement of 'zu' in this comparative PP.
Finite copular auxiliary, present indicative (3sg), linking subject to predicate adjective.
Definite article, nominative singular feminine; determiner of the subject 'Miete'.
Common noun, nominative singular feminine; subject of the copular clause.
Predicate adjective; predicative complement with 'sein' describing the subject's degree (high/expensive).

sentences.target: Sie beendet das Verhältnis nach dem Streit.
sentences.reading: /ziː bəˈʔɛndət das fɛɐ̯ˈhɛltnɪs naːx deːm ʃtʁaɪ̯t/

translations.de: Sie beendet das Verhältnis nach dem Streit.
translations.ipa: /ziː bəˈʔɛndət das fɛɐ̯ˈhɛltnɪs naːx deːm ʃtʁaɪ̯t/
translations.en: She ends the relationship after the argument.
translations.es: Ella termina la relación después de la pelea.
translations.fr: Elle met fin à la relation après la dispute.
translations.it: Dopo il litigio, chiude la relazione.
translations.zh-Hans: 争吵之后，她结束了这段关系。
translations.yue: 嗌交之後，佢結束咗呢段關係。
translations.pt: Depois da briga, ela termina o relacionamento.
translations.he: אחרי הריב, היא מסיימת את הקשר.
translations.vi: Sau cuộc cãi vã, cô ấy chấm dứt mối quan hệ.
translations.nl: Na de ruzie maakt ze het uit.
translations.hu: A vita után véget vet a kapcsolatnak.
translations.hi: झगड़े के बाद वह रिश्ता खत्म कर देती है.
translations.el: Μετά τον καβγά, βάζει τέλος στη σχέση.
translations.id: Setelah bertengkar, dia mengakhiri hubungan itu.
translations.ja: 口論のあと、彼女は関係を終わらせます。
